name: Workspace review browser trace alignment sample

source.boundary: Browser-observed synthetic traces are calibrated against reviewer-coded human task outcomes for this benchmark only.

review_findings.title: broad permission scope blocked completion
review_findings.observation: Human reviewers coded the run as an incomplete task because the permission scope felt too broad before value was proven.

review_findings.title: permission request modal drop-off
review_findings.observation: Participants stopped at the permission request modal instead of finishing the task.
Trust fell when broad access was requested before the participant saw enough value.
